title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
